mapper.select: select source, channel, goods_id, goods_name, original_price, stock from sku order by id desc limit 100
mapper.insert: insert into sku(source, channel, goods_id, goods_name, original_price, stock, create_time, update_time) values(#{source}, #{channel}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, now(), now())
mapper.delete: delete from sku where source = #{source} and channel = #{channel}
